reason: The browser mock passed all 12 Phase 12 E2E cases in three viewports; separate release evidence passed WebView2 at 100% and 150% scale, real Rust IPC, release performance, and Windows clipboard checks.

mappings.scenario: explicit Find without the global match-only Filter mode
assertions: typing backend calls = 0
Enter/Search commits exactly once
Ctrl+F focus, Escape surface, and previous/next controls use the committed query

mappings.scenario: logical focus preservation after query commit
assertions: logical row and column are preserved
range collapses to one active cell
navigation target is mounted and visible before the shortcut settles

mappings.scenario: file-tab reorder, pending switch, and 20 cache-valid round trips
assertions: pending page never overwrites the other document
20 round trips add zero page reads
file-tab menu reorder retains the active document
visible column ID order changes
selection remaps to logical IDs
copy snapshot follows the reordered visible columns

mappings.scenario: staged multi-sort panel and Shift-header plan
assertions: direction and priority edits make zero backend calls before Apply
Apply commits exactly once
priority badges and dialog controls are reachable in all viewports
controlled in-flight read exposes aria-busy and Loading page
loading reaches a terminal populated state
stale page does not cross document identity
all three viewport interactions pass
limitations: typed page-error and 15-second timeout/retry screens were not forced in this browser run

assertions: Ctrl and Ctrl+Alt each issue one boundary request
Shift preserves anchor and selection rect
PageUp/PageDown returns to a fully visible final-row target
sorted query coordinates remain logical
limitations: native WebView2 IPC count and release latency remain unverified

assertions: copy carries the committed query ID
logical row range is preserved
only visible reordered columns are sent in visible order
limitations: the browser mock validates the request snapshot, not a full 5.85M backend serialization hash

mappings.scenario: copy current/history and typed failure display
assertions: Retry creates a distinct operation ID
current and previous attempts are both visible
selectionLimit and preparing stage are shown
history remains inside all three viewports
limitations: only selectionLimit was forced; the complete typed error taxonomy is not covered

assertions: cell height is 48px
cellBottom equals gridContentBottom minus the 18px bottom clearance
the final row is fully visible in all browser viewports

nativeOnly.item: UI12-007 100% and 150% DPI native scrollbar geometry
COPY12-012 Windows clipboard and Excel warning
nativeOnly.limitation: Actual Excel-process paste remains an external environment check.
